message:
Running command: # Get the versions for all NC IPs we need
for ip in NC_XIP NC_AMBA NC_COMMON NC_GPIO NC_UART NC_SPI NC_I2C NC_TMR NC_PWM NC_DMAC NC_CRC NC_AES NC_WWDT NC_RTC NC_SYSTICK NC_RV32; do
    ver=$(ls /nc/ip/$ip/ 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    echo "$ip: $ver"
done
echo "---CF_SRAM---"
ls /nc/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/

function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
# Get the versions for all NC IPs we need
for ip in NC_XIP NC_AMBA NC_COMMON NC_GPIO NC_UART NC_SPI NC_I2C NC_TMR NC_PWM NC_DMAC NC_CRC NC_AES NC_WWDT NC_RTC NC_SYSTICK NC_RV32; do
    ver=$(ls /nc/ip/$ip/ 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    echo "$ip: $ver"
done
echo "---CF_SRAM---"
ls /nc/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/
